harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: Orion and his colleague load the Compaq into the back of an AMC Eagle
The heavy computer thuds against the trunk floor

full_prompt:
Context: This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.. Film stock: 35mm film grain. Color palette: cinematic. Lighting: cinematic. Era: modern. Mood: neutral. wide shot. 0:00-0:08: Orion and his colleague load the Compaq into the back of an AMC Eagle. 0:08-0:10: The heavy computer thuds against the trunk floor.
composite_prompt: RadioShack as background, Orion, AMC Eagle
